**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
There is a better player for mac users than mpv.
It is called iina and is an mpv frontend written in Swift.
It bugs me that I can't use it yet.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Please add iina, maybe through a dedicated flag or an explicit player option.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Maybe support any player string by the user.
But I assume that is drastically more difficult.

**Additional context**
IINA is an mpv frontend and accepts mpv-style flags.
Needless to say, it can play URLs.
